items.name: component-showcard
items.title: Component Showcard
items.description: A highly customizable card component for showcasing UI elements with gradients, badges, and interactive previews.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: React Separator component to visually or semantically separates content. Nyxhora UI

items.name: cover
items.title: Cover
items.description: A flexible cover component for displaying featured images with optional action buttons for changing or removing the cover. Nyxhora UI

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Extends the Dialog component to display content that complements the main screen. Slides in from the edge of the viewport.

items.name: dynamic-island
items.title: Dynamic Island
items.description: A floating, expandable notification component inspired by Apple's Dynamic Island. Features notification stacking with navigation dots, dismissable vs persistent notifications, priority-based ordering, and auto-collapse. Nyxhora UI

items.name: navbar-menu
items.title: Navbar Menu
items.description: React Navbar Menu component Nyxhora UI

items.name: url-tabs
items.title: URL Tabs
items.description: Enhanced Tabs component that syncs with URL parameters. Perfect for shareable tab states and deep linking. Nyxhora UI

items.name: footer
items.title: Footer
items.description: A comprehensive footer component with brand section, social links, navigation columns, and legal links. Fully responsive and customizable.

items.name: shooting-stars
items.title: Shooting Stars
items.description: A beautiful animated starfield background with shooting stars effect. Perfect for hero sections, landing pages, and space-themed designs. Nyxhora UI

items.name: color-drip
items.title: Color Drip
items.description: Animated vertical lines with colorful dripping effects. Perfect for creating dynamic backgrounds with a matrix-like or rain-inspired aesthetic. Nyxhora UI

items.name: glowing-dot-grid
items.title: Glowing Dot Grid
items.description: An interactive grid of dots that glow and expand on hover with beautiful proximity-based effects. Perfect for hero sections and interactive backgrounds. Nyxhora UI

items.name: background-beams
items.title: Background Beams
items.description: A dynamic background component featuring animated beams of light that sweep across the screen. Perfect for adding a modern, energetic, and visually striking effect to your website. Nyxhora UI

items.name: sparkles
items.title: Sparkles
items.description: A dynamic background component featuring animated particles that float across the screen. Perfect for adding a magical or festive touch to your website. Nyxhora UI

items.name: spotlight
items.title: Spotlight
items.description: A dynamic background component featuring a spotlight that follows the mouse cursor. Perfect for adding a modern, interactive, and visually striking effect to your website. Nyxhora UI

items.name: smooth-cursor
items.title: Smooth Cursor
items.description: A custom cursor component that follows the mouse with a smooth, elastic animation. Perfect for adding a modern, interactive, and visually striking effect to your website. Nyxhora UI

items.name: animated-shiny-text
items.title: Animated Shiny Text
items.description: A text component that features a shiny, animated gradient effect that moves across the text. Perfect for hero sections and call-to-action buttons. Nyxhora UI

items.name: hover-reveal-text
items.title: Hover Reveal Text
items.description: A text component that features a hover reveal effect where the text is revealed with a smooth animation. Perfect for hero sections and call-to-action buttons. Nyxhora UI

items.name: flip-words
items.title: Flip Words
items.description: A text component that features a flip effect where the words are flipped with a smooth animation. Perfect for hero sections and call-to-action buttons. Nyxhora UI

items.name: text-hover-effect
items.title: Text Hover Effect
items.description: A text component that features a hover effect where the text is revealed with a smooth animation. Perfect for hero sections and call-to-action buttons. Nyxhora UI

items.name: rainbow-button
items.title: Rainbow Button
items.description: A button component that features a rainbow gradient effect that moves across the button. Perfect for hero sections and call-to-action buttons. Nyxhora UI

items.name: ants-card
items.title: Ants Card
items.description: A card component that features a ants effect that moves across the card. Perfect for hero sections and call-to-action buttons. Nyxhora UI

items.name: exit-intent
items.title: Exit Intent
items.description: A modal component that appears when the user tries to exit the website. Perfect for hero sections and call-to-action buttons. Nyxhora UI

items.name: geist-background
items.title: Geist Background
items.description: An ambient animated background combining subtle flicker, procedural noise masks, and layered conic gradients to create depth-heavy visuals inspired by Geist-style design.

items.name: three-d-card
items.title: Three D Card
items.description: An interactive card component with real-time 3D tilt and depth effects driven by cursor movement, giving a tactile and immersive hover experience.

items.name: gradient-background
items.title: Gradient Background
items.description: A motion-based gradient background that smoothly reacts to cursor position, ideal for landing pages, banners, and hero sections.

items.name: code-block
items.title: Code Block Visual
items.description: A decorative animated grid and code-inspired background designed for developer-focused sections and technical showcases.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: A lightweight animated loading spinner built with a modern grid-style motion system for async states and transitions.

items.name: magic-button
items.title: Magic Button
items.description: A highly interactive button with reactive lighting and hover effects that follow cursor movement, designed to highlight primary actions.

items.name: magic-text
items.title: Magic Text
items.description: An animated text effect component that adds subtle glow and motion-based highlights for headings and emphasis text.

items.name: magic-card
items.title: Magic Card
items.description: A responsive card container with layered lighting and motion effects that react to cursor proximity, perfect for feature and pricing sections.

items.name: spotlight-text
items.title: Spotlight Text
items.description: A typography component that simulates a moving spotlight across text, drawing user focus through interaction.

items.name: variable-shadow-text
items.title: Variable Shadow Text
items.description: A dynamic text component where shadow direction and intensity adjust based on cursor position, creating realistic depth.

items.name: gradient-text
items.title: Gradient Text
items.description: A customizable gradient-filled text component with optional animated transitions for branding and standout headings.

items.name: shiny-card
items.title: Shiny Card
items.description: A glossy card component featuring a reflective light-sweep hover effect, giving a premium and material-like finish.
